title: The Effect of Extraction Temperature on Espresso Character
summary: Investigating how changes in brew temperature influence espresso extraction, flavour clarity, sweetness, and bitterness.
question: How does brew temperature affect espresso flavour when all other variables are kept consistent?
hypothesis: Higher extraction temperatures may increase extraction of less soluble compounds, potentially increasing body and bitterness, while lower temperatures may preserve more delicate flavours.
limitations: Only one coffee may be tested initially.
next_steps: Repeat with additional coffees to determine whether results are coffee-specific.
